nasb.text: Now the cities of the tribe of the sons of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho and Beth-hoglah and Emek-keziz,

esv.text: Now the cities of the tribe of the people of Benjamin according to their clans were Jericho, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz,

cnv.text: 便雅憫支派按著家族所得的城就是：耶利哥、伯．曷拉、伊麥．基悉、

ccb.text: 以下是便雅悯支派按宗族分到的城邑：耶利哥、伯·曷拉、伊麦·基悉、
